title: Workflow Showcase
description: A contract-driven example that demonstrates workflow diagrams and ASCII sketches.

overview.x-sample: This example shows how the generation fabric can express workflow diagrams and ASCII sketches as first-class Markdown content.

generation_flow.x-sample:
flowchart LR
  S[Schema] --> J[JSON]
  J --> R[Renderer]
  R --> M[Markdown]
  M --> D[Docs]

migration_flow.x-sample:
flowchart LR
  L[Legacy Markdown] --> I[Importer]
  I --> C[Contract]
  C --> V[Validate]
  V --> R[Render]

x-sample: Mermaid can describe the document pipeline.
ASCII art can communicate the same story in a plain-text fallback.
The Markdown renderer preserves both forms as fenced blocks.
